data.body: e165 COMMITTED (bab31c358) + PUSHED as change 563 (lower 3 preserved). Full suite: 2 fail -> 1 real (event_append invalid-type error string missing KEY_ADD/KEY_REVOKE; source-fixed) + 1 pre-existing resolve_symbol flake. Fixed B017 in held-out test (pytest.raises(rebar.RebarError) not Exception). 4 of 8 leaves committed+pushed; ddbe/4e9d/bde5 closed, e165 needs Verified+1. Pipelining 264f.
